steps.title: Identify what the pronoun must match
steps.content: The blank serves as the subject of will even find faces and must refer to The human brain from the main clause. Since brain is singular and inanimate, the pronoun must also be singular and neuter.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must agree with its antecedent in number and gender. Only it satisfies both requirements for The human brain. The other options violate agreement: they and those are plural, while she is feminine (wrong for inanimate nouns). This matches choice C — C is correct.
